feat.name: Catfolk Dance
feat.text: You have a habit of always being in the way when other creatures attempt to move. Attempt an Acrobatics check against an adjacent creature's Reflex DC.

traits.name: Catfolk
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the catfolk ancestry. Catfolk are humanoids with feline features. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by catfolk. An item with this trait is created and used by catfolk.

feat.critical_success: The target creature gains a –2 circumstance penalty to Reflex saves and is off-guard until the start of your next turn.
feat.success: The target creature gains a –2 circumstance penalty to Reflex saves until the start of your next turn.
